app.title: Better Agent
app.refreshNowDescription: Restart as soon as the backend accepts the request.
app.refreshIdleDescription: Restart after all running agents finish.
app.refreshTimeout: Backend did not come back up. Check the run.sh terminal output.
app.refreshNotAccepted: Backend did not accept the refresh request. Try again.
app.refreshUnavailable: In-app refresh requires starting Better Agent with run.sh.
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue.
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Wait 5 minutes and try again.
login.networkError: Network error. Is the backend running?
login.unknownError: Unexpected error ({{status}}). Check the backend logs.
serverSetup.title: Connect to Server
serverSetup.subtitle: Enter your Better Agent server IP (port 8000 is assumed).
serverSetup.urlRequired: Please enter a server IP or URL.
serverSetup.urlInvalid: Enter a valid IP or URL (e.g. 192.168.1.100).
mobileSetup.title: Install Mobile App
mobileSetup.subtitle: Scan the QR code with your phone to download and install the native app.
mobileSetup.noAndroid: No Android build available. Place the APK in ~/.better-agent/mobile/
mobileSetup.noIos: No iOS build available. Place the IPA in ~/.better-agent/mobile/
mobileSetup.hint: After installing, the app will ask for this server's address on first launch.
desktopInstall.title: Install Better Agent for {{platform}}
desktopInstall.body: Use the desktop app for this machine.
settings.desktopSubtitle: Download the desktop package served by this Better Agent backend.
settings.desktopStatusFailed: Could not load desktop download status.
app.reconcilingTitle: Backend is reconciling lagged events. Shown only when >0.3s.
app.refinedPromptEmpty: Refined prompt is empty — nothing to send.
app.deleteSessionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete session "{{name}}"? This action is irreversible.
voice.permissionDenied: Microphone access was denied. Enable it in your device settings and try again.
voice.unavailable: Speech recognition isn't available on this device.
voice.activationHint: Say: open prompt, prompt your text, close prompt, yes or no, new session.
chat.emptySubtitle: Send a message to start coding with Claude.
chat.stickToBottomTitle: Auto-scroll: keeps the view pinned to the latest message. Auto-engages when you scroll to the bottom; disengages when you scroll up.
chat.rearrangerTitle: Experimental: run a side Claude session that emits a hierarchical intent tree of this session
input.placeholderDisabled: Select or create a session to start...
input.placeholderActive: Send a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
input.interruptTitle: Cancel current turn and send this prompt immediately
input.forkTargetTitle: Send / Fork will go to this pane
input.engineerTitle: Open a dedicated prompt-engineering session (empty draft = start from scratch)
input.reviewTitle: Adversarial review of the worker's last output
input.steerTitle: Send into the active Codex turn
input.forkTitleEnabled: Fork the original session and send this prompt to the new fork (which gains focus)
notes.hint: Use the note button in the input area to save text as a note
todos.hint: Appears when the agent calls TodoWrite (Claude) or update_topic (Gemini).
comments.empty: No comments yet. Select text in the chat to add one.
message.autoContinuing: Auto continuing in a fresh session…
setup.pickTemplate: Pick a template to start from.
setup.templateClaudeBlurb: Anthropic subscription — OAuth via the Claude Code CLI.
setup.templateCodexBlurb: OpenAI Codex subscription — uses the Codex CLI with your ChatGPT account.
setup.templateAgyBlurb: Google Antigravity subscription — uses the agy CLI.
setup.templateOllamaBlurb: Local Anthropic-compatible models via Claude Code.
setup.templateZaiBlurb: Z.AI's Anthropic-compatible API. Needs an API key.
setup.templateCustomBlurb: Any Anthropic-compatible endpoint. Provide URL + key yourself.
setup.apiKeyPlaceholderKeep: Stored in keychain — leave blank to keep
setup.apiKeySecurityHint: Stored in the OS keychain. The key is not written to config files, Provider Config Sync, session logs, or model context.
setup.configDirHintClaude: Claude config / credentials directory. $HOME is expanded at apply time.
setup.configDirHintCodex: Codex config / credentials directory for Provider Config Sync. $HOME is expanded at apply time.
setup.configDirHintGemini: Gemini config / credentials directory for Provider Config Sync. $HOME is expanded at apply time.
setup.configDirHintAgy: Antigravity CLI config / credentials directory for Provider Config Sync. $HOME is expanded at apply time.
setup.defaultCannotDelete: Default provider can't be deleted — set another as default first.
setup.firstRunSubtitle: Install a provider CLI, define a provider, then run sessions from the real app.
setup.prerequisiteMissing: {{command}} is required before automatic install can run.
setup.providerCliToolsSubtitle: Install missing CLIs or update installed provider tools from here.
setup.providerDefinitionMissing: Add a provider definition after installing a CLI.
setup.projectsMissing: Add at least one project so project-level configs can sync.
setup.configRepoEnabled: Repository sync is enabled. Pulls are applied to real provider config files automatically.
setup.configRepoMissing: Connect a git repo for global and project-level provider configs.
setup.networkStepDescription: Choose whether Better Agent listens only on this computer or on every network interface.
setup.networkStepSecurity: Local-only is safer. Network access can expose the app to other devices on reachable networks, so use it only on trusted networks with firewall rules you understand.
setup.networkLocalDescription: Only apps on this machine can connect.
setup.networkLanDescription: Other devices may connect through this machine's reachable IP addresses.
setup.passwordsStepDescription: You can store service passwords and provider API keys from Settings after setup.
setup.passwordsStepSecurity: Secrets are saved in your OS keychain. Better Agent stores only labels and never syncs them to the config repo or sends them to the model.
workers.title: Workers
workers.empty: No workers yet. Team sessions need approval before spawning fresh workers, so creating some upfront speeds things up.
workers.divergedTitle: Worker Better Agent session has changed since last fork. Team fork is stale — click 'Reset' to re-fork.
workers.unregisterTitle: Unregister as a worker (Better Agent session is not deleted)
workers.descriptionLabel: Description (becomes the Better Agent session's name):
workers.noEligibleSessions: No eligible sessions in this cwd.
workers.unregisterConfirm: Unregister this worker? (Better Agent session is not deleted)
workers.resetForkConfirm: Reset all forks pointing at this worker? Next delegation will re-fork from the worker's current state, losing context the manager had built up.
settings.crossSessionDelegateAutoHint: When on, delegate_to_session can fork another session and run without the confirmation picker. Continue-mode always asks. Off by default.
settings.contextStrategyHint: When the context window is full: 'Auto compact' lets the CLI summarize history. 'Start new session' creates a fresh session chained to the previous one, with a recall tool to search old transcripts.
settings.delegateTaskPolicyHint: How `delegate_task` routes a handed-off task: 'Auto' finds a fitting session (or creates one); 'Always create new' skips the search. The '+ approve' options ask you before dispatching.
settings.internalLlmHint: Which provider, model, and reasoning effort run the backend's own LLM tasks. Any field left as 'Inherit' falls back to the default provider, so the unconfigured state is never a hardcode.
settings.sessionAutoDeleteHint: Days. Leave empty to never auto-delete sessions.
settings.title: Settings
settings.passwordManagerHint: Store service passwords in the OS keychain. Better Agent keeps only service/account labels; the secret is not sent to the model, session logs, Provider Config Sync, or the config repository.
settings.passwordManagerEditing: Enter a new password, then store to update this keychain item.
settings.passwordManagerDeleteConfirm: Delete this password from the OS keychain?
settings.extensionsHarnessDeliveryHelp: How Better Agent exposes extension harness files to provider runs.
settings.extensionsUiSurfacesHelp: Buttons or pages this extension adds to Better Agent.
settings.extensionsMcpServersHelp: MCP servers exposed as tools to Claude, Codex, or Gemini runs.
settings.extensionsRemoteServicesHelp: External services this extension declares for proprietary or hosted logic.
settings.extensionsInstructionsHelp: Extra instructions injected into agent context.
settings.extensionsPermissionsHelp: What this extension can access. Required permissions are always on; optional ones are controlled here.
settings.extensionsPermission.session_st: Can read session state and change session-owned data. Risk: a buggy or malicious extension could expose or alter your conversations.
settings.extensionsPermission.spawn_runs: Can start Claude, Codex, or Gemini work. Risk: it can spend tokens, run tools, and trigger filesystem changes through the normal agent flow.
settings.extensionsPermission.internal_l: Can call trusted internal APIs. Risk: this is high trust because it can reach backend-only actions that regular pages cannot.
settings.extensionsPermission.filesystem: Can read or write files through approved extension paths. Risk: private code, notes, or secrets in files may be exposed or changed.
settings.extensionsPermission.network.ri: Can contact external services. Risk: data from Better Agent or your project could leave this machine.
settings.extensionsPermission.secrets.ri: Can request stored credentials through consent-gated flows. Risk: credentials are sensitive even when access is mediated.
settings.extensionsPermission.provider_c: Can read or modify provider settings. Risk: it can affect which models, tools, or config files future runs use.
settings.extensionsPermission.backend_ro: Can serve its own backend endpoints inside Better Agent. Risk: endpoint bugs can expose data or actions to the UI.
settings.extensionsPermission.storage.ri: Can persist its own data under Better Agent's extension storage. Risk: bad data may survive restarts until removed.
settings.extensionsPermission.mutates_se: Can change only the listed session flags. Risk: it can alter behavior for those specific features.
settings.extensionsPermission.unknown.ri: This permission is not recognized by this UI. Treat it as high risk until the extension explains it.
settings.extensionsSettingsHelp: Configuration values read by this extension.
session.aiSearchPlaceholder: Describe the session you're looking for…
session.aiSearchRun: Run AI search on the current filter text
session.searchField.title: Title
session.folderViewOn: Folder view — click for flat list
session.folderViewOff: Flat list — click to group by folder
session.noTagsYet: No tags yet — create one in the tag panel
workers.creationPolicyTitle: Choose what manager sessions do when they need to create a fresh worker.
projects.empty: No projects yet. Click + Add to pick a directory.
files.symbolsUnavailable: Symbols index unavailable — showing path/name results only
fileViewer.changedSinceLoadedTitle: File changed on disk since this view loaded
fileViewer.videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support video playback.
mediaPreview.videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support video playback.
orchestration.label: Orchestration
newSession.title: New Session
newSession.managerModeUnavailable: Team mode requires a provider that supports it (e.g. Claude). Configure one in Providers to enable.
machines.title: Machines
machines.denyConfirm: Deny registration from "{{id}}"? It will need to re-register to reconnect.
machines.pendingHint: These nodes dialed the primary and are waiting for approval before they can run sessions.
machines.none: No machines configured. Edit topology.yaml on the primary host to add worker nodes.
machines.stateDisconnectedDesc: Node was previously connected but is now offline
machines.stateUnknownDesc: No connection has been established with this node yet
share.title: Attach screenshot to…
machines.deleteConfirm: Delete machine "{{id}}"? It will need to re-register to reconnect.
machines.deleteConfirmConnected: Machine "{{id}}" is currently connected. Delete it anyway? Active sessions will be severed.
machines.deleteFailed: Failed to delete machine "{{id}}". Check the backend logs.
machines.restartConfirm: Restart machine "{{id}}"? It will briefly disconnect and reconnect.
machines.restartFailed: Failed to restart machine "{{id}}". It may be offline.
mappings.title: Project Mappings
mappings.none: No project mappings found. Projects on different machines will be auto-matched when they share a git remote, path, or name.
nodeApproval.title: New machine wants to connect
nodeApproval.subtitle: A worker node is requesting to join. Approve it only if you recognize it.
model.label: Model
promptEng.title: ⚙ Engineer my prompt
promptEng.description: Open this draft in a dedicated session that iteratively refines it. The final file content is sent to the parent session.
promptEng.forkBlurb: Carries the parent's Claude conversation context. Best when the prompt references the current chat.
promptEng.forkUnavailable: Unavailable — parent session needs at least one turn first.
promptEng.freshBlurb: Clean Claude context, same project root. Best for prompts that don't depend on the current chat history.
promptEng.sendHint: Send delivers the current prompt.md to the parent session as a normal user message and discards this engineering session.
fork.reopenTitle: Reopen this fork — re-enable focus + new prompts
fork.deleteConfirm: Delete fork "{{name}}" forever? Its messages will be lost.
fork.closeTitle: Close this fork — pane stays visible but cannot receive new prompts
supervisor.separateFailedBusy: Cannot separate while a turn is queued or in flight
advSync.title: Adversarial sync
advSync.missingForks: One or both forks no longer exist.
runDetails.title: Run details
runDetails.processesSubtitle: Root PID + every descendant. State R=running, S=sleeping, D=blocked-on-IO, Z=zombie.
runDetails.noPid: No PID stamped yet — runner is still starting (or this entry leaked).
dirPicker.title: Pick Project Directory
dirPicker.willCreate: “{{path}}” doesn't exist yet — it will be created when you select it.
dirPicker.truncated: Showing first {{count}} matches — refine your search
fileChooser.title: Project Files
filePicker.title: Pick a File
filePicker.truncated: Showing first {{count}} matches — refine your search
filePicker.symbolsUnavailable: Symbol search needs ripgrep (rg) installed — showing path/name matches only
approval.header: Team session wants to spawn a fresh worker — approve?
approval.descriptionPlaceholder: Worker description (becomes Better Agent session name)
engFile.changedTitle: File changed on disk since this editor opened
fileComment.placeholder: What should change here? (Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to submit)
fileComment.queuedHint: {{count}} comment(s) queued — keep selecting to add more, then Send to deliver them in one turn.
fileComment.emptyHint: Select text in the file to queue a comment for that range. Multiple comments batch into one Send.
language.label: Language
refreshResult.failed: Backend restarted; frontend build failed — using previous build ({{hash}})
refreshResult.noChangeNote: The frontend build succeeded. The Git version is unchanged; local uncommitted changes may still be included.
schedule.title: Schedule send

update.body: A new version of the app is available ({{version}}).
update.error: Couldn't download the update. Is the server reachable?
